info.name: REM — Full Backend
info.description:
Complete coverage of the REM backend.

Test-data examples baked into every request body. Auto-saves chain IDs across folders so a top-to-bottom run requires only:
  • testEmail, testPassword, targetUserId set in the env
Login auto-saves accessToken / refreshToken / userId; later folders save organizationId, teamId, spaceId, taskId, sprintId, roomId, messageId, callId, sessionId, etc.

exec: if (v) { pm.environment.set('organizationId', v); console.log('saved organizationId', v); }
if (v) { pm.environment.set('teamId', v); console.log('saved teamId', v); }
if (v) { pm.environment.set('spaceId', v); console.log('saved spaceId', v); }

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Wire push notifications on iOS",
  "description": "FCM credentials are ready; wire the upload flow + cleanup dead tokens.",
  "type": "Task",
  "priority": "Medium",
  "points": 5,
  "labels": [
    "mobile",
    "push"
  ]
}
